title: helianthemum guttatum subsp. milleri
intro: Helianthemum guttatum subsp. milleri, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rockrose include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its full potential.
